name: Proof Golf
about: Proof Golf is a fully self-service, 24/7 indoor golf facility equipped with cutting-edge hardware and a golf-specific gym. The venue focuses on providing a technologically advanced environment for golfers to train and play, with a strong emphasis on data-driven improvement through partnerships with brands like Garmin R50 and TruGolf Apogee. It caters to individuals looking for flexible gameplay and structured training, offering options for one-time sessions or various membership plans to suit different budgets and training needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Fully self-service, 24/7 access provides maximum flexibility for any schedule
Partnerships with premium brands like Garmin and TruGolf offer accurate, reliable data for game improvement
On-site golf-specific gym allows players to train like a pro and complement their practice sessions

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor featuring high accuracy
Precision ball and club tracking system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage), and you are welcome to bring your own food. Complimentary coffee is also available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary based on the number of players and pace, but it is typically completed within 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is Proof Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is suitable for juniors and youth golfers, offering a family-friendly environment for learning and practice.
